payload.tactic: seq 1 0 : (c{1} = gen_CTR_encrypt_bytes take_xor (cc OCC.gs{1}) k{1} n{1} 1 p{1} /\ (n{2}, a{2}, p{2}) = nap{2} /\ c{2} = gen_CTR_encrypt_bytes take_xor (cc OCC.gs{2}) k{2} n{2} 1 p{2} /\ t{2} = genpoly1305 (cc OCC.gs{2}) k{2} n{2} (topol a{2} c{2}) /\ (n{1}, a{1}, p{1}) = nap{1} /\ k{1} = k{2} /\ nap{1} = nap{2} /\ OCC.gs{1} = OCC.gs{2} /\ (glob I){1} = (glob I){2}).
